title: Sky-Block
description: Customizable mod for Hypixel Skyblock removing/moving chat messages
body:
# Sky-Block
## `Information` Simple, yet highly customizable mod for Hypixel Skyblock. It allows you to specify custom regexes, choose from predefined ones, either block them completely separate UI similar to Skytils mod. If you want toast notifications for some specific skyblock messages (similar to ones located in skytils, install [skycubed](https://modrinth.com/mod/skycubed) mod. All Config is accessible through ModMenu and or the `/sky-block` command. ## `Options`
Lobby - Lobby Join
Ability - Previous Ability Removed
System - GEXP Gain - Profile ID - Playing on Profile - Watchdog Report
Skyblock - Skyblock Welcome - Fire Sale - Allowance - NPC - NPC Buy - Buy Limit
Travel - Warping - Sending to Server - Unknown Destination
Dungeon Hub - Dungeon Reward
Dungeon - Cannot use outside Dungeon - Queuing - Starting - Stats Doubled - Class Messages - Dungeon Request Already - Selected Class Message
Mining - Wind Changed Direction - Event Starting - Fallen Star
Item - Cannot Use Item - Ability Cooldown - Zombie Sword no more Charges
Miscellaneous - Ringing - Already found Fairy Soul
Ironman - Auction Disallowed
## `Bisect Partnership` [![Promo Code](https://mayaqq.dev/files/server-host.png)](https://server.mayaqq.dev) ## `Community` For any questions or support you can join my discord by clicking the button below!
